title: Subscription use cases
excerpt: Learn about some of the business use cases for subscriptions. [Integrate a SaaS business](https://docs.stripe.com/saas.md): Learn how to build a SaaS business with Billing and other Stripe products. [Integrate a sales-led B2B business](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/sales-led-billing.md): Quote and bill complex sales contracts automatically on Stripe Billing. [Billing for a multi-entity business](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/multi-entity-business.md): Integrate Stripe Billing for a business with more than one legal entity. [Integrate with Salesforce](https://docs.stripe.com/use-stripe-apps/stripe-app-for-salesforce/overview.md): Integrate Stripe Billing with your Salesforce workflows and processes.…
